sentences.text: Climate change is one of the most pressing challenges facing our planet today.
Deforestation threatens biodiversity and contributes to global warming at an alarming rate.
Recycling and reducing waste are simple actions that everyone can take to help the environment.
Renewable energy sources such as solar and wind power are becoming more affordable every year.
The Great Barrier Reef is one of the most diverse ecosystems on Earth and must be protected.
Plastic pollution has become a serious problem for marine life and ocean ecosystems worldwide.
Planting trees is one of the most effective ways to combat climate change and restore nature.
National parks preserve natural habitats and provide opportunities for people to enjoy the outdoors.
